pages.text: Stew Swift-Growth Seeds, Rafflesia, and such in a pot, using a Villager (or Illager) head as a bowl, and you'll get this mysterious dish that can scare Villagers to tears.

pages.title: Bowl of Stuffed Tall Skull Fried Rice
pages.text: Obtained by right-clicking a Stuffed Tall Skull with a bowl.$(br)Grants the consumer:$(br)$(li)1 minute of Nourishment$(li)5 minutes of Photosynthesis II$(li)10 minutes of Bad Omen (stacks with each consumption, up to level 5)
